seo.title: HeartLink - Private Matchmaking for Select Indian Families
seo.description: Founder-led, offline matchmaking for select Indian families. No public profiles, no browsing - private introductions guided by Gopi Shah and Alpa Apoorva.
seo.ogDescription: Private matchmaking for select Indian families, with careful family background review, relationship guidance and no public profile exposure.

hero.title: Private matchmaking for select Indian families.
hero.description: HeartLink helps families find the right life partner through trusted networks, careful judgment and complete privacy. Founded by Gopi Shah, with relationship guidance led by Alpa Apoorva.
assurances: Co-founded and led personally by Gopi Shah
hero.note: Co-founded by Gopi Shah · 50 active mandates, total · No public profiles
hero.privacyNote: Identity is shared only with approval.

legacy.title: Marriage is a family decision. We treat it like one.
legacy.lead: Families come to HeartLink when a match needs judgment, privacy and real attention - not another biodata exchange.
paragraphs: We look at family background, education, values, lifestyle and long-term fit, not just a profile. Every introduction is private and shared only when there is genuine interest on both sides.

audience.title:
Parents feel reassured.
The next generation feels respected.
audience.description: Parents want background, seriousness and trust. Sons and daughters want compatibility, comfort and a real say in the decision. HeartLink holds both, equally.

cards.label: For parents & families
cards.title: Strong family understanding.
cards.description: Before any introduction is made, we understand family values, reputation, education, profession and social standing - properly, not from a form alone.

cards.label: For sons & daughters
cards.title: Modern compatibility. No app culture.
cards.description: We take the time to understand personality, goals and what you actually want. Introductions are few, private and yours to say yes or no to.

registry.title: Apply free. Stay private. Be considered, quietly.
registry.lead: The Private Registry is not an active search. It is a confidential way for HeartLink to know who you are before a paid mandate ever begins.
paragraphs: We will not pitch you publicly or circulate your details. If a family we are already working with appears to be a genuine fit, HeartLink may reach out privately before anything is shared.

privacy.title: Your family details stay strictly private.
privacy.description: There is no public database. No browsing. No searchable biodata. No sharing of personal details without approval.

cards.title: No public profiles
cards.description: Profiles are not shown online or made searchable.

cards.title: Consent before sharing
cards.description: Details are shared only after both sides show genuine interest.

cards.title: Human verification
cards.description: We use conversations, references, social checks and direct review - not only forms.

cards.title: Founder review
cards.description: Important introductions are personally reviewed before moving ahead.

proofHeading.title: Public work behind private judgment.
proofHeading.description: Selected credibility signals from Gopi Shah's community, cultural and matrimonial work.

proofAssets.label: Award recognition
proofAssets.title: Dr. Sarojini Naidu International Award
proofAssets.description: Recognition connected to Gopi Shah's contribution to education, culture and community service.

proofAssets.label: Founder-led practice
proofAssets.title: Jeevansathi - Juhu
proofAssets.description: Before HeartLink, Gopi Shah guided Jeevansathi - Juhu as an honorary matrimonial service for well-regarded families.

proofAssets.label: Cultural credibility
proofAssets.title: Community work across India and the United States
proofAssets.description: Her broader cultural and community work informs the discretion and judgment HeartLink brings to family-led searches.

process.title:
Simple steps.
Careful introductions.
process.description: From the first call to the final decision, the process stays private, personal and deliberate.

steps.label: Private meeting
steps.title: We understand your family.
steps.description: We speak privately and understand the person, family background, expectations and comfort level.

steps.label: Profile review
steps.title: We build the full picture.
steps.description: We review education, work, personality, family details, values and social context.

steps.label: Selected introductions
steps.title: Only considered options are shared.
steps.description: We do not send random profiles. Each introduction is reviewed and shared privately.

steps.label: Guidance
steps.title: We support the conversation.
steps.description: We help both sides move ahead with clarity, comfort and respect.

steps.label: Family support
steps.title: We stay involved when needed.
steps.description: HeartLink can support family discussions, expectation-setting and early adjustment.

storiesHeading.title: Quiet stories, shared with care.
storiesHeading.description: Approved anonymized client stories can be published after consent and privacy review.

founder.imageAlt: Gopi Shah, Founder and Principal Advisor of HeartLink
founder.quote: A good match is not only about two people. It is also about two families feeling comfortable.
founder.description: Gopi Shah personally guides HeartLink's matchmaking work, with Alpa Apoorva ensuring every introduction holds up emotionally as well as on paper.

finalCta.title:
Looking for a serious match?
Start with a conversation, not a profile.
finalCta.description: Tell us about your family and the person seeking a match. Every enquiry is reviewed privately.
finalCta.note: By appointment only · All enquiries remain confidential
